src/main/java/com/gsdd/adminserver/Admin.general_idea: Reorder import statements to follow a specific alphabetical or grouping convention.
Remove unnecessary trailing newline or whitespace at the end of the file.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/adminserver/Admin.human_impl: Removed the empty line before the closing brace of the class.

src/test/java/com/gsdd/adminserver/Admin.general_idea: Replace empty test method with an explicit assertion to verify the application context is not null.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.6 to 3.1.5 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Update Spring Cloud BOM version to 2022.0.4 to align with Spring Boot 3.x.
Update spring-boot-admin-server dependency to version 3.1.8 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add spring-cloud-starter-config dependency to enable configuration server support.
Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to 0.8.11 and simplify configuration by using append mode.
Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin to 3.2.2 for better Java 21 test execution support.
Upgrade Maven Failsafe plugin to 3.2.2 for better Java 21 integration test support.
Introduce Spotless Maven plugin for code formatting and import ordering.
Introduce Maven Checkstyle plugin for static code analysis.
Introduce OWASP Dependency-Check plugin for security vulnerability scanning.
Remove the old formatter-maven-plugin as it is replaced by Spotless.
Change integration test exclusion pattern from IT*.java to It*.java.
Add JaCoCo check execution with minimum coverage rules for lines and branches.

.gitignore.general_idea: Regenerated the .gitignore file using a different template source (toptal.com) to update IDE and OS-specific ignore patterns.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced header comments and bulk sections with output from https://www.toptal.com/developers/gitignore/api

.gitignore.general_idea: Added ignore pattern for annotation processing test output directories.
Added ignore pattern for IntelliJ AWS plugin user-specific configuration.
Added ignore pattern for IntelliJ SonarLint plugin data.
Added ignore pattern for macOS iCloud generated files.
Added ignore pattern for the .sonarqube directory used by SonarQube scanner.
Added ignore pattern for Gradle build output directories, excluding source builds.
Ensured Gradle wrapper properties are not ignored by adding a negation pattern.
Added ignore pattern for Java heap dump files.
Removed the custom ignore rule for the example directory.

README.md.general_idea: Update the documented Java version requirement to reflect the migration to Java 21.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Java 17' (implied or previous) to 'Java 21' in the Pre-requisites section.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for building and running the application using Docker.
README.md.human_impl: Added a 'Docker Image' section with commands for 'docker build' and 'docker run'.

sonar-project.properties.general_idea: Increment the project version number in Sonar configuration to reflect the new release cycle.
Add environment variable injection for SonarQube login token to enable authenticated analysis.
Update the SonarQube Java source version property to 17 to align with the migration target.
Update the path to the JaCoCo XML report to match the new build output structure.
Add configuration for the Dependency-Check HTML report path in SonarQube.
